title: nepeta nervosa var. nervosa
intro: Nepeta nervosa var. nervosa, also known as Catmint, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds such as nepetalactone, a natural sedative and anxiolytic. The plant is known to offer health benefits including reducing anxiety, stress, and insomnia, as well as promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality. Catmint is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used topically in skincare products due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
